title: Mushroom Tempura with Oyster Dipping Sauce
description: A Japanese-inspired dish featuring crispy tempura mushroom served with a tangy oyster dipping sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine flour and ice water to make a tempura batter.
Dip each mushroom piece into the batter, coating evenly.
Heat vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
Fry the battered mushrooms in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
Drain the tempura mushrooms on paper towels.
In a small bowl, whisk together oyster sauce, soy sauce, and sake (if using).
Serve the tempura mushrooms with the oyster dipping sauce and garnish with green onions.
Serve with toast on the side.
